notes.name: Mount Erbemoizko
notes.legend: Dormant volcano. Height: 10289 ft.

notes.name: Abka Hot Springs
notes.legend: A geothermal springs with naturally heated water that provide relaxation and medicinal benefits. Average temperature is 28°C.

notes.name: Sam Fountain of Youth
notes.legend: This legendary water source is whispered about in ancient tales and believed to possess mystical properties. The spring emanates crystal-clear water, shimmering with an otherworldly iridescence that sparkles even in the dimmest light.

notes.name: Bostowbovil — silver mining town
notes.legend: Bostowbovil is a mining town of 17190 people just nearby the silver mine.

notes.name: Seongdong Waterfall
notes.legend: An impressive waterfall has cut through the land.

notes.name: Mulesto Battlefield
notes.legend:
A historical battle of the Penkhamian Campaign. 
Date: September 23, 501 Duney Era.

notes.name: Dungeon
notes.legend: Undiscovered dungeon. See One page dungeon

notes.name: Dungeon
notes.legend: Undiscovered dungeon. See One page dungeon

notes.name: Dungeon
notes.legend: Undiscovered dungeon. See One page dungeon

notes.name: Albrorough Monster
notes.legend: Locals say a relic monster of 11 ft long inhabits Albrorough Lake. Truth or lie, folks are afraid to fish in the lake.

notes.name: Bet-Halin Troll
notes.legend: Tipplers speak of a giant Troll who inhabits Bet-Halin hills and prefers eating children.

notes.name: Imik Forest
notes.legend: A forest sacred to local Masingstow Society.

notes.name: Tubarban Statue
notes.legend:
An ancient statue. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
ᡯᡱᡗᡱᢜᠯᢠ᠐ᠿᢏᡳᡒᢁᢐᡭᢤᡴᢤᢐᢓᠧᡑᡮᡔᢐᠠᡳᢏᠳᡍᡞᠪᠪᡒᡆᡮᡒᢓᡔ᠐ᡲᡔᡁᠧᡱᢡᡴᡔᡑᡁᡜᡠᡀᡝᡗᡗᢐᡆᡴᡗᢓᡁᡜᡔᠲᡮᢢᢠᡕ᠐ᠧᡒᢁ

notes.name: Zana Megalith
notes.legend:
An ancient megalith. It has an inscription, but no one can translate it:
༭༈༄༖༿༂༻༧་༂༕༘༣༻༁༵༬༔༊༆༴༱༠༵༃༢་༴༈༩༬༔༠༒༺༗༧༽༪༶༳

notes.name: Ruined Pyramid
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient pyramid. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Ruined Stronghold
notes.legend: Ruins of an ancient stronghold. Untold riches may lie within.

notes.name: Kyeru Library
notes.legend: A vast collection of knowledge, including many rare and ancient tomes.

notes.name: Minor Jetty
notes.legend: A small location along the Monterente River to launch boats from sits here, along with a weary looking owner, willing to sell passage along the river.

notes.name: Mules migration
notes.legend: A huge group of mules are migrating, whether part of their annual routine, or something more extraordinary.

notes.name: Madgi Chasm
notes.legend: The Madgi Chasm. Locals claim that it is totally empty.

notes.name: Fidudifa Necropolis
notes.legend: This cursed necropolis is veiled in perpetual twilight, perpetuating a sense of impending doom. Dark enchantments shroud the tombs, and the moans of anguished souls resound through its crumbling halls.

notes.name: Random encounter
notes.legend: You have encountered a character.
